title: verify FMT1 stripping logic is correct and well-commented
description: EccKey::verify strips FMT1 modifier bits (P-flag bit 6, subject-number bits 11:8, mask 0x0F40) before matching against TPM_RC_SIGNATURE. The condition (bit 7 set AND bits 15:12 clear) correctly identifies FMT1 codes and excludes wolfTPM internal codes (negative i32, high bit set). The detailed comment citing TPM2 Part 2 §6.6.3 and explicitly rejecting the 'bit 8 clear' discriminator is exactly right. A future contributor might simplify this to a naive == comparison; resist that.
